channel.title: U.S. Financial News, Markets, Banking and Business — Investment Banking
channel.description: Latest U.S. market news, banking updates, business insights, investigations, and real-time analysis to keep you informed on key financial developments

item.title: Supreme Court Justices Ask Congress to Increase Security Due to Increasing Threats
item.description:
U.S. Supreme Court justices are urging Congress to approve additional funding for judicial security as threats against judges, their families and court staff continue to increase nationwide.

Key points:
• Supreme Court justices requested increased federal funding to strengthen judicial security.
• Budget proposal includes expanded Supreme Court Police, residential protection and upgraded security infrastructure.
• Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan warned that threats against judges continue to rise.
• Congress will review the funding request as part of the federal appropriations process.

Read the full article: Supreme Court Justices Ask Congress to Increase Security Due to Increasing Threats
